activation_gates.name: $600 payment
activation_gates.evidence: Current agreement: payment will be provided after delivery.

activation_gates.name: BDPC drafting doctrine
activation_gates.evidence: BDPC-confirmed drafting notes and July 20 written confirmation preserve dimensional, wall, block, model-space, and presentation rules

activation_gates.name: Controlling source package
activation_gates.evidence: Thomas CAD scope folders, current crawl register, all-image contact sheets, and trace-reference package are prepared.

activation_gates.name: Target DWG version and dependencies
activation_gates.evidence: Resolve from the supplied native package; request direction only if the package does not establish a reproducible target

activation_gates.name: Licensed compatible AutoCAD runtime
activation_gates.evidence: Final native drafting, dependency validation, and plot fidelity require the AutoCAD license/workflow.

activation_gates.name: Locked production day
activation_gates.evidence: Delivery directed for 4:00 PM EDT on July 22, 2026, subject to cleared activation gates

milestone_register.milestone: Business objective and delivery model captured
milestone_register.acceptance: Residential production burden, quality objective, and cutting-edge-not-bleeding-edge principle documented
Dimension, wall, block, model-space, paper-space, LiDAR, and self-check rules preserved
930 current media/CAD/point-cloud files classified; source-role register and contact sheets created.
Five of five validation pairs passed
Primary/support wall-height slices, trace DXFs, and master trace DWG/DXF prepared.
Brian authorized Existing Main Level As-Built Floor Plan, DWG + PDF, $600, due July 22
Payment collected after DWG/PDF delivery under current agreement.
Thomas CAD source folders are organized and current crawl/trace registers are copied to drafter read-first folder.
Target DWG opens; xrefs, fonts, plot style, layouts, and title block reproduce
Envelope, walls, partitions, openings, stairs, and fixed content drafted from controlling evidence
Source-supported annotations follow confirmed BDPC standards and 1/2-inch convention
No unexplained gaps, duplicates, unreviewed candidates, or standards violations
DWG opens cleanly and PDF matches final visible drawing without clipping
One native DWG and one PDF delivered with unresolved-condition disclosure if required
One consolidated in-scope drafting correction resolved and final package accepted

file_controls.control: Reference for wall/opening/major-feature tracing; not final issued linework by itself
Use if DWG reference path/version causes friction
Primary horizontal slices and trace master are derived from this source
Use to resolve unclear interior zones; disclose remaining uncertainty
Do not generate final geometry from this PNG
Use compatible drafting logic/blocks; do not import unrelated project geometry
Use for known gaps, file roles, and stop conditions

cad_prep_register.acceptance: Invoice/payment is completed after accepted DWG/PDF delivery.
Current Thomas CAD package is already organized; freeze a dated production copy when AutoCAD drafting begins.
Original source files remain read-only and unchanged
Trace references are metric/source-preserved; final architectural scale must be locked in AutoCAD against floor plate or known dimension.
AutoCAD Core Console created/evaluated starting template; final native drafting/plotting license remains pending.
Fonts, SHX, xrefs, images, object support, CTB/STB, and page setups must be checked in final AutoCAD environment.
TCADD and 1419 references are identified; approved blocks still require native review.
Run once final AutoCAD production file is active.
Starting template exists; final BDPC title block, plot style, and dependency behavior still require native confirmation.
Primary/support slices, individual DXFs, screenshots, and master DWG/DXF are prepared for manual tracing.
Apply 3.5-inch baseline unless trace/source evidence supports another assembly.
Use established blocks/sizes where source-supported; disclose unresolved openings.
Use 1/2-inch display convention and reconcile chains/overall dimensions.
Run native audit, dependency, viewport, page setup, and plot checks after linework exists.

automation_register.human_control: Results establish file integrity, not registration or architectural truth
Human selects useful evidence and rejects artifacts
Master DWG/DXF is trace reference only; final linework requires human CAD cleanup.
No automatic transform or registration acceptance
Every block classified approved, reject, or needs review
Findings inform cleanup; no automatic destructive rewrite
Generated vectors must be retraced/cleaned before issue.

automation_register.capability: Layer, style, property, and dependency validator
automation_register.human_control: Exceptions resolved or disclosed before issue
Flags arithmetic and geometry conflicts; does not invent corrections

automation_register.capability: Viewport, page setup, and plot comparison
automation_register.human_control: Human visually compares final PDF to visible DWG
Final package released only after human signoff
Never substitutes for CAD review or BDPC acceptance

automation_register.capability: Automatic design decisions or concealed-condition reconstruction
automation_register.human_control: Returned to BDPC or disclosed as unresolved

qa_register.check: Exactly one existing main-level floor-plan sheet
qa_register.acceptance: No proposed, site, design, or other-floor content is issued
Production baseline is frozen and traceable
Scale checks reconcile with reliable project dimensions
No unrecorded transform or registration claim
3.5-inch basis used unless evidence supports another assembly
No unexplained gaps, overlaps, duplicate lines, or unreviewed candidates
Locations and sizes are source-supported; established blocks reused when appropriate
Placed only where supported by controlling evidence
No finer residential dimension is displayed without direction
Dimension arithmetic agrees with measured geometry within approved tolerance
Every annotation is supported or clearly qualified
Matches supplied BDPC standards with no unexplained overrides
Scale, layer, attributes, and insertion behavior are valid

qa_register.check: Xrefs, fonts, SHX, images, and object support
qa_register.acceptance: No production-critical unresolved reference or substitution
DWG opens in confirmed target environment without critical errors
No unresolved audit error affecting delivery

qa_register.check: Title block, layout, viewport, and page setup
qa_register.acceptance: Sheet presentation reproduces the confirmed BDPC standard
PDF is legible, correctly framed, unclipped, and visually consistent with the final DWG
Material uncertainty is disclosed rather than concealed
One native DWG and one PDF are delivered with required dependency or exception notes

acceptance_criteria: The package contains one Existing Main Level As-Built Floor Plan only, in native AutoCAD DWG and PDF formats
The DWG opens in the confirmed target version with no known production-critical dependency failure
The plan reflects the controlling point cloud and supporting information without proposed design or unsupported conditions
Walls and closed boundaries have no unexplained gaps, duplicates, or unreviewed candidate geometry
Typical 2×4 framed walls use the confirmed 3.5-inch basis unless evidence supports a different assembly
Doors, windows, openings, stairs, fixtures, and fixed equipment are placed where supported or disclosed as unresolved
Dimensions follow the confirmed 1/2-inch residential convention and chained/overall dimensions reconcile
Dimensions, labels, room names, and notes are source-supported or clearly qualified
The PDF is legible, correctly framed, free of clipping, and consistent with the final visible DWG
Material unresolved conditions or approved departures are disclosed rather than concealed

risk_register.response: Proceed under current agreement; collect payment after accepted delivery.
AutoCAD license timing now controls schedule; disclose any license-related delivery impact.
Apply source hierarchy, freeze baseline, and escalate only material conflicts
Preserve native coordinates and reconcile against dimensions and City floor plate; make no registration claim
Validate fonts, xrefs, plot styles, object support, layouts, and page setups before drafting reliance
Classify reusable blocks and audit scale, layers, attributes, and exploded-state risk

risk_register.risk: Unsupported condition inferred to meet deadline
risk_register.response: Stop, disclose, and return material decisions to BDPC

risk_register.risk: Scope creep from prior three-sheet proposal
risk_register.response: Current authorization and validator enforce one existing-condition sheet only

runtime_register.purpose: Core Console created/evaluated a starting template; final manual drafting, dependency validation, and plotting require licensed AutoCAD.
Keep client originals immutable and production changes traceable

runtime_register.version: Python / laspy / NumPy / image and PDF QA
runtime_register.purpose: Bounded evidence processing and integrity controls
Current authority, payment, standards, evidence, QA, and acceptance visibility
Validate generated and manually drafted content before issue
Architectural interpretation and final professional acceptance remain with BDPC
Master DWG/DXF, slice screenshots, individual DXFs, and manifests are ready for licensed drafting.
930-file scope register and all-image contact sheets classify source, derived, reference-only, and out-of-scope material.

zero_friction_activation.client_action: Review the public file-role list and object if any source role is wrong; confirm when licensed AutoCAD production access is available. Payment remains due after delivery.
zero_friction_activation.default_authority: Unless Brian sends replacements, CAD Guardian will use the existing shared project package and the drafting doctrine already confirmed in the meeting and July 20 email.
provider_actions_after_payment: Use the organized Thomas CAD source package and current trace-reference package
Open the starting template and attach/reference the trace master DWG/DXF
Use 20260710222318 and 20260710222414 support material for unclear interior zones
Use the area PNG only to reconcile gross dimensions and area
Draft clean wall/opening geometry manually in AutoCAD
Apply TCADD model-space logic and 1419 sheet/presentation standards
Run native DWG and plot QA; disclose unresolved conditions instead of inventing them
zero_friction_activation.acceptance_message: Source roles, standards, and trace references are ready. The remaining production gate is AutoCAD license/runtime availability plus final scale/source confirmation.

deadline_control: Production is ready to resume when licensed AutoCAD access is available; delivery timing must reflect the license gate and final native QA.

glossary_register.term: Existing Main Level As-Built Floor Plan
glossary_register.meaning: The only authorized drawing sheet: existing main level floor plan only.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Defines what the DWG/PDF must contain.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Do not add proposed, site, other-floor, section, elevation, or design work.

glossary_register.meaning: Draw observed/source-supported current conditions, not new design intent.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Prevents scope creep from older proposal material.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Unsupported or proposed conditions are excluded unless Brian authorizes them.

glossary_register.meaning: The editable AutoCAD drawing file BDPC receives.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Primary deliverable must open and remain usable in the target AutoCAD workflow.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Requires final licensed AutoCAD openability, dependency, and audit checks.

glossary_register.meaning: The plotted sheet exported from the final visible DWG.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Client-readable issue format and visual check record.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Must be legible, correctly framed, unclipped, and consistent with the DWG.

glossary_register.meaning: Current concise one-page working scope reference.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Controls active fee, scope, and commercial boundary.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Earlier broader proposals are archive-only.

glossary_register.meaning: Brian authorized the one-sheet trial by email.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Allows work to proceed under the current scope.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Signature block remains not executed; disclose as current status.

glossary_register.meaning: Payment is not a pre-production blocker under the current agreement.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Keeps production gate focused on AutoCAD/runtime and source confirmation.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Collect after accepted DWG/PDF delivery.

glossary_register.meaning: The full AutoCAD environment needed for final drafting, dependencies, and plotting.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Main remaining production gate.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Do not represent the final DWG/PDF as complete until this workflow passes.

glossary_register.meaning: Headless AutoCAD tool that created/evaluated the starting template.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Useful preflight evidence, but not final manual drafting by itself.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Does not replace final licensed AutoCAD review and plot QA.

glossary_register.meaning: Clean trace-ready DWG created from the standards/template path.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Starting point for final production drafting.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Not the final deliverable; it contains setup/reference state only.

glossary_register.meaning: Plan/wall-height trace reference generated from point-cloud slices.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Primary drafting reference for walls, openings, and major features.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Trace aid only; final issued linework requires manual cleanup and QA.

glossary_register.meaning: Point-cloud file format used by the scan sessions.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Measured source evidence behind the trace references.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Use 20260710222125 as primary and support scans for unclear zones.

glossary_register.meaning: Measured scan evidence of existing conditions.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Supports geometry and feature placement.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Measured evidence, not automatic truth; reconcile and disclose uncertainty.

glossary_register.meaning: Additional scan sessions for unclear interior areas.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Reduces uncertainty where the primary trace is ambiguous.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Use to resolve interior zones; do not force certainty where evidence remains weak.

glossary_register.meaning: Dimensioned/gross area reference image.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Useful for gross area and scale reconciliation.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Never generate final geometry from this PNG alone.

glossary_register.meaning: Model-space drafting logic and block/vocabulary reference.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Helps match BDPC drafting behavior.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Standards reference only; not Dunn project geometry.

glossary_register.meaning: Brian-provided gold-standard drawing package.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Guides title, sheet, fonts, dimensions, lineweights, and plotting style.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Presentation/style reference only; not Dunn geometry.

glossary_register.meaning: AutoCAD area where real-size drawing geometry is drafted.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Walls/openings/features should be clean and measurable here.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Keep rational geometry; avoid cosmetic-only fixes.

glossary_register.meaning: AutoCAD sheet environment for title block, viewport, notes, and plotting.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Controls final plotted PDF appearance.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Match BDPC/1419 presentation where possible.

glossary_register.meaning: Paper-space window showing model-space geometry at a sheet scale.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Affects what appears on the final PDF.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Verify scale, clipping, lock state, and framing before issue.

glossary_register.meaning: Sheet identity block with project/sheet/revision/issue information.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Part of the final deliverable presentation.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Use BDPC/1419 standard fields where available; disclose missing dependencies.

glossary_register.meaning: AutoCAD plot-style files controlling lineweight/color plotting.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Critical to matching the expected PDF appearance.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Final plot QA must confirm the correct plot style or disclose substitution.

glossary_register.meaning: Text and shape dependencies used by AutoCAD drawings.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Missing files can change drawing appearance or warnings.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Audit final DWG dependencies and disclose unresolved substitutions.

glossary_register.meaning: External reference attached to a DWG.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Can affect title blocks, backgrounds, or reference geometry.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: No broken or private absolute-path xrefs in final issue package.

glossary_register.meaning: Displayed residential dimensions no finer than 1/2 inch unless Brian directs otherwise.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Controls annotation style and review expectations.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Do not use rounding to hide avoidable geometric error.

glossary_register.meaning: Typical 2x4 framed walls start at 3.5 inches.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Controls default wall thickness assumptions.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Use other thicknesses only when evidence or BDPC direction supports them.

glossary_register.meaning: Priority order for deciding which evidence controls.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Prevents silent conflicts between scans, references, standards, and inference.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Written direction, trace/source evidence, then standards/reference material; inference last.

glossary_register.meaning: Last check that units, scale, source coverage, and authority are responsible.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Gate before final drafting confidence.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Stop if scale or coverage cannot be locked.

glossary_register.meaning: Final DWG opens in the target AutoCAD environment without critical issues.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Required for a usable native deliverable.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Run before issue and record/disclose dependency problems.

glossary_register.meaning: Check that the PDF matches the final visible DWG and sheet setup.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Required before sending final PDF.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Verify framing, clipping, text, lineweights, scale, and legibility.

glossary_register.meaning: Clear note/log for material unknowns that could not be responsibly resolved.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Protects against false certainty in the final package.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Disclose instead of inventing room names, swings, hidden construction, or unsupported dimensions.

glossary_register.meaning: Written approval required for added sheets, design work, changed inputs, or extra services.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Protects schedule and fixed-fee scope.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Do not absorb new scope into the current one-sheet delivery.

glossary_register.meaning: One consolidated correction for demonstrable drafting error or omission.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Defines post-delivery included response.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: Not a fragmented review round or new-scope redesign.

glossary_register.meaning: Brian/BDPC retain architectural interpretation and final professional acceptance.
glossary_register.delivery_relevance: Final authority is not automated or transferred.
glossary_register.action_or_limit: CAD Guardian produces controlled CAD; BDPC accepts professional use.
